- content: "Team Building Activities Plan\nThe objective of this document is to outline\

    \  - Description: A workshop where teams are presented with several problem scenarios\
    \ related to their work. Teams will brainstorm and present their solutions.\n\
    \  - Objective: To improve problem-solving skills and encourage innovative thinking.\n\
    \  - Location: Conference room A\n  - Date: 2023-11-15\n  - Time: 10:00 - 12:00\n\

    \ of outdoor challenges that require teamwork, physical effort, and strategic\
    \ thinking.\n  - Objective: To strengthen team bonds and encourage physical wellness.\n\
    \  - Location: Green Park\n  - Date: 2023-11-22\n  - Time: 09:00 - 15:00\n\nActivity\
    \ 3: Team Lunch and Learn\n  - Description: An informal session where team members\
    \ share knowledge over lunch. Each session, a different team member presents on\
    \ a topic of their choice.\n  - Objective: To foster a culture of learning and\
    \ knowledge sharing.\n  - Location: Office cafeteria\n  - Date: Every Thursday\n\

  - Description: A hosted virtual trivia game covering a mix of general knowledge, pop culture, and company-related topics. Team members are split into groups and compete to answer questions correctly.
  - Objective: To encourage friendly competition, boost morale, and strengthen team bonds in a fun and relaxed setting.
  - Location: Online (video conferencing platform)
  - Date: TBD
  - Time: 17:00 - 18:30

Activity 6: Volunteer Day
  - Description: The team spends a day volunteering for a local charity or community project, such as a food bank, park clean-up, or mentorship program.
  - Objective: To foster a sense of purpose, social responsibility, and teamwork outside of the usual work environment.
  - Location: TBD (local charity or community site)

Activity 1: Problem-Solving Workshop

  -\

\

Activity 3: Team\

  - Objective: To foster a culture of learning and knowledge\

content.content:
The two new activities have been successfully added to `team-building-activities.docx`! Here's a summary of what was added:

1. **Activity 5: Virtual Trivia Night** 🎉
   - A hosted virtual trivia game with general knowledge, pop culture, and company-related questions.
   - Objective: Encourage friendly competition, boost morale, and strengthen team bonds.
   - Location: Online (video conferencing platform)

2. **Activity 6: Volunteer Day** 🤝
   - A day spent volunteering for a local charity or community project (e.g., food bank, park clean-up, mentorship).
   - Objective: Foster purpose, social responsibility, and teamwork outside the office.

Both activities have placeholder dates (TBD) so you can schedule them at your convenience. Let me know if you'd like any changes!
